arts.ttl: Man City goalkeeper Ederson extends Premier League record
arts.sum: Man City goalkeeper Ederson has done it again. The Brazil international is renowned for his ball playing ability, establishing himself as one of the best passers in his position since joining the north west outfit from Benfica in 2017. That has made the 31-year-old a key part of the team’s buildup play under Pep Guardiola, […] The post Man City goalkeeper Ederson extends Premier League record first appeared on The Football Faithful.
